data.title: SL Green Realty raises dividend by 3%
data.description:
• SL Green Realty (NYSE:SLG) declares $0.2575/share quarterly dividend, 3% increase from prior dividend of $0.2500.
  • Forward yield 1.4%
  • Payable Jan. 15; for shareholders of record Dec. 31; ex-div Dec. 31.
  • See SLG Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: United Homes Group prices secondary public offering of class A common stock
data.description:
• United Homes Group (NASDAQ:UHG) has priced secondary offering of 7.24M common shares at $5.00 per share.
  • Of the offered Shares, almost 20% of the shares (1,448,200 common shares) are being purchased by the Company’s Executive Chairman, the Company’s Interim CEO, affiliates of Kennedy Lewis Agency Partners, LLC and certain other persons identified by management, and the remainder are being purchased by institutional investors.
  • The shares are being offered by selling shareholders, which the selling shareholders have received through convertible notes payable pursuant to a redemption of the notes and is expected to close on December 11.
  • The company will redeem notes in exchange for an aggregate of $70M plus accrued and unpaid interest on the total outstanding aggregate principal amount of the notes through the settlement date of cash and 10,168,850 shares of Class A common stock.
  • The selling stockholders will retain exchanged shares that are not sold in the offering for a period of 120 days.
  • The Company will finance the redemption, in part, by entering into a credit agreement with Great Southern Homes, Kennedy Lewis, as administrative agent, and the lenders party thereto, pursuant to which the lenders will fund a $70M subordinated loan.
  • UHG -6.8% after hours to $5.68
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: IREN mines fewer bitcoins in November over October
data.description:
• IREN (NASDAQ:IREN) said on Friday it mined 379 bitcoins in November, compared to 439 in the prior month.
  • Average operating hashrate for the month came in at 19.7 EH/s, compared to 19.9 EH/s a month ago.
  • The company's revenue per bitcoin was $86,065, up from $64,165 in October.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Beam Therapeutics picks Ironwood Pharmaceuticals finance and operations chief as CFO
data.description:
• Beam Therapeutics (NASDAQ:BEAM) has appointed Sravan K. Emany as CFO, effective December 19, 2024. He most recently served as CFO and chief operating officer at Ironwood Pharmaceuticals (IRWD).
  • ASRT -3% premarket to $0.9175
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: SSR Mining to buy Cripple Creek & Victor gold mine from Newmont in $275M deal
data.description:
SSR Mining (SSRM) said Friday it agreed to acquire the Cripple Creek and Victor gold mine in Colorado from Newmont (NYSE:NEM) for $100M in upfront consideration and up to $175M in additional milestone-based payments.

SSR Mining (SSRM) said the deal will create the third largest U.S. gold producer, adding ~170K oz in annual gold production to its platform; combined with Marigold, the company's total U.S. gold production is expected to average 300K-400K oz annually.

SSR Mining (SSRM) said it expects the all-cash transaction will be accretive to key metrics including net asset value, gold production, gold mineral reserves and resources, operating cash flow and free cash flow.

data.title: AMC Entertainment Holdings dips on filing to sell upto 50M shares
data.description:
AMC Entertainment Holdings (NYSE:AMC) may issue and sell an aggregate of up to 50,000,000 shares of Class A common stock through its sales agent Goldman Sachs.

The common stock sales, if any, may be made in sales deemed to be “at-the-market offerings.

The Common Stock will be offered and sold pursuant to the Company’s shelf registration statement on Form S-3 filed on August 4, 2022.

Shares are down 10% in premarket trading.

Press Release

data.title: Genesco Non-GAAP EPS of $0.61 beats by $0.32, revenue of $596M beats by $18.07M
data.description:
• Genesco press release (NYSE:GCO): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.61 beats by $0.32.
  • Revenue of $596M (+2.9% Y/Y) beats by $18.07M.
  • Comparable e-commerce sales increased 15%; comparable store sales increased 4%
  • Raises sales guidance to down 1% to flat compared to Fiscal 2024, or flat to up 1% excluding the 53rd week in Fiscal 2024
  • Raises Fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS guidance to $0.80 to $1.00

data.title: TRX Gold appoints Richard Boffey as COO
data.description:
• TRX Gold (NYSE:TRX) announces the appointment of Richard Boffey to succeed Andrew Cheatle as COO, effective immediately.
  • Cheatle also resigned as a director of the company.
  • Most recently, Boffey held the position of General / Country Manager at the Tara Resources Brskovo Mine Project in Montenegro, where he led the technical studies, engineering design, resource drilling, project financing, and site preparation activities for the construction and development of a mining operation.

data.title: Laurentian Bank of Canada Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.89, revenue of C$250.77M
data.description:
• Laurentian Bank of Canada press release (OTCPK:LRCDF): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.89.
  • Revenue of C$250.77M (+1.3% Y/Y).

data.title: BitFuFu says 1,643 BTC held, and 84 produced from self-mining operations in November
data.description:
• BitFuFu (NASDAQ:FUFU) will begin regularly issuing monthly updates for investors and the general public and expects to gradually expand its monthly disclosures with additional data, it said on Friday.
  • BTC Held: 1,643 BTC as of November 30, 2024.
  • BTC Produced: 84 BTC produced from self-mining operations in November 2024.
  • Self-mining fleet increased by 13,300 miners or in total of 2.4EH/s in November 2024.
  • Net cash of $98 million as of November 30, 2024.
  • Source: Press Release
